mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , T1.* FROM ( SELECT
FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN LOG_GG_USER LG ON WHERE BOARD_CD = 'Y'
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC) T1 ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{offset} AND #{limit}
SELECT * FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BOARD_CD = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY REPLY_DATE DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN LOG_GG_USER LG ON WHERE BOARD_CD = 'Y'
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BNO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_NO,USER_ID,USER_NAME, BOARD_CONTENT,BOARD_TITLE, POST_DATE,BOARD_CD) VALUES ( #{boardNo},#{boardWriter}, #{boardWriter}, #{boardContent},#{boardTitle}, DEFAULT,DEFAULT)
mapper.update: UPDATE REPLY SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo}
UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_CD = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
